sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 18:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 18:1
items.html: Because the screen had been refined of its entire coarseness and equalized with Malchut of the Rosh, as it is known about the rest of the Partzufim. (Inner Light, Item 6)
